title: Company Names Tribunal decision: O2 Entertainment Limited
body: "Application number 5388  Applicant O2 Worldwide Limited objected to the name used by O2 Entertainment Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 22 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of O2 Entertainment Limited is changed to 15347233, Ltd. "
